title: Hl7V2StoreMetrics
description: List of metrics for a given HL7v2 store.

metrics.description: List of HL7v2 store metrics by message type.

name.description: The resource name of the HL7v2 store to get metrics for, in the format `projects/{project_id}/datasets/{dataset_id}/hl7V2Stores/{hl7v2_store_id}`.
